name: Tuna & Apple Bake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Bread crumbs, buttered and seasoned
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions, celery, and apples in butter until tender but not brown.
2. Stir in soup, milk, rice, tuna, salt, and pepper; mix thoroughly.
3. Pour into a buttered, shallow 2-1/2-quart casserole dish and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 20 minutes, or until thoroughly heated.
